overall.description: A first-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle in Cyberpunk 2077, taking off from an urban plaza and flying through a futuristic cityscape. The journey passes over streets, a coastal Ferris wheel, beachfront, industrial solar farms, and finally approaches a towering skyscraper for landing.

events.description: flying vehicle accelerates and gains altitude leaving the plaza behind

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle taking off from an urban plaza and ascending over city streets

entered.detail: concrete skate park with ramps and bowls directly below the vehicle
tall palm trees lining the edges of the plaza
multi-story commercial structures with advertisements and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a low-altitude view of a concrete skate plaza directly below. The vehicle ascends and accelerates, revealing city streets and palm trees while commercial buildings rise on either side.

events.description: large white ferris wheel comes into view on the right side as the vehicle approaches the coast

agents.ego_description: flying over urban streets at medium altitude approaching a coastal amusement area

entered.detail: large white ferris wheel structure at the coastal entertainment area
multi-lane roads with sparse traffic visible below

segments.scene_description: Flying over city streets with commercial buildings falling behind, a massive ferris wheel emerges on the right as the vehicle approaches the coastal district. The ground below shows asphalt roads with light traffic.

events.description: flying past the ferris wheel revealing open ocean and sandy beach coastline

agents.ego_description: flying along the coastline with expansive ocean views to the right

entered.detail: expansive blue ocean water stretching to the horizon
sandy beach area between the urban development and ocean
wooden piers extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes the ferris wheel and transitions to a coastal scene with the ocean visible to the right and sandy beaches below. Wooden piers extend into the water while urban buildings line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial agricultural complex with greenhouse arrays

events.description: transition from coastal area to industrial zone with extensive white greenhouse structures

agents.ego_description: flying over industrial agricultural greenhouses in a desert-like terrain

entered.detail: vast arrays of white-roofed greenhouse structures covering the desert floor
arid brown desert landscape surrounding the industrial complex

segments.scene_description: Leaving the coast behind, the scene shifts to an industrial zone featuring endless rows of white greenhouses covering the desert terrain. The arid landscape stretches to the horizon with no vegetation visible.

events.description: vehicle slows down and begins approach to destination skyscraper
arriving at central business district with dense cluster of tall skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: approaching a tall skyscraper for landing on the rooftop helipad

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with rooftop structures and landing pad
dense cluster of high-rise buildings forming the city center

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows as it approaches a massive destination skyscraper in the city center. The industrial greenhouses give way to a dense urban skyline of glass towers as the vehicle prepares to land on the rooftop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial ascent from a concrete urban plaza that transitions through a coastal district and an industrial wasteland before returning to a dense city center. It begins by climbing away from a skate plaza, accelerating upward as commercial buildings and palm trees flank the vehicle's path. As the vehicle pushes forward, the urban streets give way to a coastal vista where a massive ferris wheel emerges on the right and sandy beaches with wooden piers stretch along the shoreline. The scene then shifts abruptly from the blue ocean to an arid industrial zone, gliding over endless rows of white greenhouses that cover the desert terrain. Finally, the landscape transforms once more as the vehicle slows its approach, leaving the greenhouses behind to enter a skyline of glass towers and align with a massive destination skyscraper for landing.
